programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Nya and the ninja race to obtain the Storm Amulet before Prince Kalmaar can get it and use it to awaken the doomsday serpent, Wojira.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: In NINJAGO City, Wu, Cole, Kai, Ray, and Misako must infiltrate the Explorer's Club and recover the Storm Amulet before King Kalmaar and his troops.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Prince Kalmaar attacks NINJAGO City to obtain the Storm Amulet, but he runs into an unexpected obstacle: a determined young papergirl.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Nya learns the history of the Storm Amulet. Meanwhile, Wu, Kai, Cole, Ray, and Misako try to prevent King Kalmaar from escaping the city with the Storm Amulet.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Kalmaar awakens Wojira and sets his sights on the destruction of NINJAGO City.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: The ninja do all they can to evacuate the city as King Kalmaar's assault on the surface world of Ninjago begins.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: The ninja suffer a defeat at the hands of Wojira, and Nya contemplates a decision that may save her friends and her city... but could spell her own doom.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Nya leads the ninja against Kalmaar and Wojira in the final battle to save Ninjago City.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: A year after Nya's sacrifice, the Ninja reunite to investigate Vengestone smuggling and the appearance of a team of New Ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: After rescuing a drowning sailor, Nya meets a fellow water-elemental and comes up with a plan to regain her humanity.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja investigate the Vengestone operation but end up fighting each other after a humiliating rescue by the New Ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: When the Mayor refuses to release Aspheera from Kryptarium Prison, the Ninja go undercover to free the villain themselves.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja attempt an incognito highspeed heist to retrieve Aspheera's magical staff, but another run-in with the New Ninja exposes their secret.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja ward off the New Ninja to buy time while Aspheera returns Nya to human form, and a new villain plots trouble for NINJAGO.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja are imprisoned, and Lloyd receives a mysterious masked visitor with a cryptic warning from the Crystal King.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja run into an old enemy in prison and attempt to thwart his escape, while Nya finds new hope in an old mech.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Nya, as Samurai X, helps the Ninja escape, but NINJAGO's toughest marshal, Hounddog McBrag, is hot on their trail.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: A hopeful singer headed to NINJAGO City helps Kai, Zane and Dareth evade Hounddog McBrag, and Zane learns the value of emotions.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja regroup at Twitchy's gas station and escape Hounddog McBrag's capture with a plan to infiltrate the Council of the Crystal King.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Lloyd travels in disguise to a hidden temple where he joins the Council of the Crystal King and learns Kabuki Mask's true identity.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Harumi tells Lloyd how she survived and became the herald of the Crystal King. Lloyd learns her plan for NINJAGO but is powerless to stop her.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja search for Lloyd and walk right into Harumi's trap as Lloyd falls victim to her manipulation.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja search for escape while Master Wu and the others defend the Weapons of Spinjitzu from the Council of the Crystal King.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Nya, as Samurai X, rescues the Ninja, but Harumi's plan for the Weapons of Spinjitzu is already in motion.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Lloyd escapes from the Crystal Temple with the help of an unlikely ally, as both the Crystal King and the Ninja prepare for battle.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja retrieve the Destiny's Bounty and race to rescue Lloyd as he evades capture in the jungle below the Crystal Temple.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja fight back against the Crystal King's army as Lloyd and Master Wu trace a clue back to an unlikely ally.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Lloyd and Master Wu listen to Garmadon's recent journey of self-improvement and find the clue they need in the fight against the Crystal King.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Garmadon trains Lloyd to use the Oni Form, but the Ninja resort to another strategy as the Crystal King's forces reach NINJAGO City.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja launch an assault through NINJAGO City in their upgraded vehicles, but the Crystal King unleashes a new source of power to stop them.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Master Wu takes shelter with an unlikely resistance while Nya and Jay escape the wreckage of the Destiny's Bounty with a plan to find help.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Pixal takes the broken Zane to Borg Tower for repairs with the help of unlikely allies, and Lloyd shows an old adversary what it means to be a hero.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Kai and Cole avoid capture and bring new hope to the resistance, while Lloyd and Garmadon search for the missing Serpentine.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja reach out to allies across NINJAGO, while at Borg Tower Pixal prepares for the coming battle

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Racer Seven escorts Cole across NINJAGO City to send for help, and Lloyd gives Garmadon a chance to prove he has changed.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja prepare to make their last stand as the crystal army closes in, while Lloyd and Garmadon take the fight to the Crystal King

programme.title: Ninjago Legends: Monstrosity
programme.desc: Kai, the Ninja of Fire, is lost in a Land of Monsters, where he must face a series of vicious and bizarre creatures, if he has any hope of getting home.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: The Blood Moon
programme.desc: While protecting Ninjago City from daily threats, the Ninja encounters a new elemental master in league with an old enemy.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: Ras attacks the Cloud Kingdom to obtain information on the Forbidden Five; Euphrasia informs the ninja and they set off to save the kingdom.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: Beyond the Phantasm Cave
programme.desc: Cinder and Jordana compete for Lord Ras's favour; the ninja set out to find a teacher who can defeat the Wolf Clan; Wyldfyre sneaks on the Destiny's Bounty.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: Force From the East
programme.desc: The ninjas find two old dragon masters who agree to train them. Meanwhile, Ras invades the Land of Lost Things.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: The Spell at the Waterfall
programme.desc: Egalt teaches the Rising Dragon to the ninja; Sora and Riyu learn Spinjitzu from Rontu; Cole reaches the Monastery with the Finders and sets off on an adventure with Zane.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: To Mysterium
programme.desc: Cole, Zane and Bonzle travel to Mysterium, only to fall into Dorama's trap; Arin is frustrated with his Spinjitzu training.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: Fugitives From Madness
programme.desc: Zane, Bonzle and Cole meet their creator Gandalaria. Kai is appointed the third Dragon Master. The dragon masters turn into stone sculptures as the blood moon appears in the sky. The other ninja's training ends prematurely.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: Secrets of the Wyldness
programme.desc: When Rontu and Egalt turn to stone, Lloyd's visions lead the ninja to Wyldness. There, the ninja seek shelter in the sorceress's warehouse. Cole and Zane fight against the administration and allow Bonzle, Sprite and Gandalaria to escape.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: The Forest of Spirits
programme.desc: Cole, Zane and Gandalaria search for a release spell and obtain magical powers. The ninjas rush to the Ritual of the Blood Moon to stop Lord Ras. Kai and Sora disguise themselves as Wolf Mask Warriors.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: Rising Ninja
programme.desc: The blood moon ritual begins. Ras has everything he needs to free the Forbidden Five. The ninja confronts him and tries to disrupt the ritual; Kai and Bonzle are trapped in the portal, but Lloyd and Arin are there to help.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: The Shape of Motion
programme.desc: While searching for his parents, Arin and the Ninja rescue a baby dragon, uncovering a new mystery and mission for the team.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: Enter the City of Temples
programme.desc: When the Ninja are not invited to the Tournament of Sources, they break into the City of Temples to earn their entry.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo sufren un accidente en el desayuno que les trae muchos problemas. Mientras Jonathan necesita el apoyo de su familia para una presentación en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián. Segunda parte.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego y Peluzin empiezan un Boy Band, Gaspar se ve forzado a integrarse por problemas económicos. El Abuelo intenta comenzar una relación amorosa.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene problemas con el alcohol, y destruye el departamento. Peluzin descubre que va a heredar una gran cantidad de dinero y el Abuelo lo ayuda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego, traumado por asistir a una corrida de toros, cambia su estilo de vida. Jonathan se entera de una noticia que cambiara su vida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar pierde su trabajo y se desconecta del mundo mientras que el Abuelo y el Noruego empiezan un negocio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego suben de peso y Jonathan tiene problemas con un bully en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una persona del pasado del Abuelo reaparece en su vida. El Noruego tiene problemas dentales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene un sueño de convertirse en policía. El Abuelo sufre un accidente en la regadera

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo entra en el mundo de la actuación y Peluzín es arrestado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se de cuenta que el y el Noruego pueden ser padre e hijo. Pitipú es atropellado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo, con la ayuda de Gaspar, hace una lista de todas las cosas que quiere hacer antes de morir. Peluzin y el Noruego están adictos a un videojuego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En este episodio La familia del barrio muestra una divertida parodia a las Sitcoms mas populares, desde la óptica del prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Don Sebas se casa en una isla tropical y todos viajan a la boda. Sin embargo, los descuidos del Abuelo hacen que casi se pierda el evento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels para un baño de burbujas lleno de diversión, donde hacen de cuenta que bañarse es divertido, pero con burbujas es la bonanza de la diversión.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a Little Angel para divertirte al aire libre! Desde payasadas en el patio hasta patinaje, familias de dedos, seguridad en la cama, concientización sobre accidentes y faltar a clase, ¡un día de juegos y seguridad!

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The evolution of technology; how things now considered obsolete worked such as the typewriter, VCR, analog TV, vinyl record, film camera and brick-sized mobile phone, as well as products that superseded them.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: It's impossible to live without them, and yet they didn't even exist a couple of decades ago; episode counts down a list of the top ten technological innovations of the last generation.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Leonardo da Vinci remains intriguing 500 years after death; beyond great artist, he was remarkable scientist and inventor whose notebooks contained incredible machines from weapons to submarines, robots, and analogue computers with workable plans.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: DVD, CD, PDA, HDTV, PVR--used to be the ultimate in "gotta have it" gadgets and gizmos and "to die for" technology that populate a digital world of acronyms.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Benjamin Franklin, the oldest Founding Father, was the late 18th century's foremost scientist and greatest inventor; created Pennsylvania Stove, lightning rod, glass armonica for Mozart and Beethoven and anti-counterfeiting techniques.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: A fun-filled glimpse into the not so distant history of video games; since inception, the gaming industry has been a driving force in computer technology and video games are one of today's dominant entertainment mediums.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: His movies are legend, his women beautiful, and his toys the best in the world; James Bond is foiling villains in space-age flying machines or eavesdropping on his enemies with ultra-sophisticated spy gear.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Thomas Edison announces plans for the central lighting of New York before an electrical system exists or electric light is invented.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Thomas Alva Edison, the Wizard of Menlo Park, created electric lights, power systems, motion pictures, recorded sound, and tattoo pens; his innovations evolved into modern CDs, iPods, satellite radio, and technologies from Internet to outer space.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Arguably the most influential book ever written, the Bible provides a glimpse into the origins of ancient technology and its use to withstand the elements, build great structures, wage war, and conserve precious water.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Salute to tools and toys that stood the test of time from Zippo lighters to Palm Pilots; examine technology behind familiar gadgets including flashlights, transistor radios, safety razors, and metronomes that changed lives.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The assembly and surprising history behind the airboat; a wild ride on a big-tired swamp buggy; local delicacies that bring new meaning to acquired taste; a massive engineering project to divert the mighty Mississippi River; pythons and alligators.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: A historic survey of adaptation to killer environmental conditions travels to the desert, Arctic, sea, jungle and space, charting the body's physiological responses to extreme circumstances such as frostbite, heatstroke and hypothermia.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: In 1973, a desperate America, starved by an OPEC embargo, began construction on an 800 mile lifeline for its oil hunger; study the technological triumph of the Alaskan oil pipeline built over mountains and tundra, where temperatures drop below zero.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy battles an opponent who's too hot to handle, Robin gets attacked by a jungle, and Chopper makes a heroic dash for the Straw Hat flag!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's red-hot battle with Papa threatens to destroy the entire icy island, and the rest of the Straw Hats need a little help from a former enemy to recover their flag!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The most adorable hero the world has ever known – Chopperman – must battle a hideously evil villain to regain control of his favorite television station!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While sailing through haunted waters, the Straw Hats encounter a ghost ship that's home to a walking, talking skeleton!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats attempt to unravel the mystery of their new comrade, but the skeleton's sad story is interrupted by a ghastly landing at the haunted island of Thriller Bark!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After getting stranded at Thriller Bark, Chopper, Nami, and Usopp are chased by a three headed beast. Back on the boat, Luffy and the rest of the Straw Hats are terrorized by an unseen enemy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper, Nami, and Usopp get scared out of their minds when they encounter a graveyard full of zombies! Meanwhile, the rest of the crew gets trapped in super creepy sea web!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An invisible man turns Nami's bath time into a harrowing experience, and Usopp battles a hall full of haunted paintings with a handful of burning candles!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Usopp, Nami, and Chopper seek to unravel the secrets of the haunted mansion, Luffy and the gang do battle with an army of the undead!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy sets his sights on the shadowing-stealing monster known as Gecko Moria, and the zombie army prepares for a night attack led by their perverted, invisible leader!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp, Chopper, and Nami get trapped in a coffin after being slashed by a zombie samurai. Meanwhile, Luffy and the rest of the Straw Hats make short work of some haunted paintings!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After escaping from their coffin prison, Usopp, Chopper, and Nami do battle with a garden full of adorably dead zombie animals!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An undead warthog sets her sights on Nami, Zorro and Sanji vanish without a trace, Franky and Robin battle an unbeatable army, and Luffy gets captured!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A penguin zombie starts acting an awful lot like Sanji, Nami continues running for her life, and Robin and Franky buy some time by blowing up a bridge!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami gives love advice to a zombie, Luffy finds himself face-to-face with Gecko Moria, and Robin gets caught in spooky spider web. Things look bleak for the Straw Hats until their skeleton friend lends a hand!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook strikes the final blow in his battle with the spider monkey, Gecko Moria's devious plan is revealed, and Luffy's escape attempt leads to the loss of something he can't live without!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook tells Franky and Robin the secret to slaying zombies, and Gecko Moria reveals the terrifying monster that will be the recipient of Luffy's shadow!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's shadow is forced into the body of a monster, Usopp and Chopper get incinerated, and Nami is kidnapped by a zombie who wants to make her his wife!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Gecko Moria's minions struggle with the burden of feeding a giant zombie brought to life by Luffy's shadow. Meanwhile, Brook flashes back to a battle that almost cost him his beloved afro!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The freshly-revived trio of Luffy, Zoro, and Sanji discover that their shadows are missing, and Franky relates Brook's story about a promise he made to a very special whale!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the Straw Hats flash back to the heartbreaking story of Laboon the abandoned whale, and Brook's battle with the zombie samurai reveals the reason behind his intense afro love!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy sets out to regain his shadow and convince Brook to join the crew. Meanwhile, Sanji races to stop Nami's zombie wedding before it's too late!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp's naturally negative personality makes him the only Straw Hat who stands a chance against Perona's depressing army of ghosts, and Chopper prepares to do battle against his hero, Dr. Hogback!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When Brook is overmatched by the zombie samurai, Zoro steps in to help the skeleton get his shadow back. Meanwhile, Luffy prepares for a battle with Gecko Moria, and Sanji interrupts an undead wedding!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Despite his furious attempts, Luffy struggles to land a blow against Gecko Moria, but Sanji fares much better in his passionate attempt to defeat Nami's beastly abductor!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji takes a beating when his opponent suddenly turns invisible, Luffy finally manages to land a blow in his battle with Gecko Moria, and Usopp uses fire to ward off a zombie bear!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After getting the stuffing beat out of him by a zombie teddy bear, Usopp summons his sharp-shooting alter ego to help him discover the secret to defeating Perona!

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: When they rescue a young prince from an uprising that kills the rest of his family, Dylan and Tyr are asked to be his advisers.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan and his new Commonwealth fleet take on the Drago-Kazov fleet but find it much larger than he expected.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Magog eggs in Harper are starting to hatch, so the team builds a Tesseract Machine. After unintended time shifts, Trance is replaced by her future self.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan takes over a tourist barge in an attempt to escape mercenaries.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A body identification goes awry when it turns out Beka's former crewmate isn't dead at all.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda rescues dying people from a drift, but they soon turn into zombies being controlled by a hive-mind.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Engine of Creation is capable of rewriting the universe according to the owner's wishes. Dylan, Beka, and Trance must obtain it before someone with dark plans gets it.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A black hole knocks out Dylan and sends him into an alternative reality with a wife and child.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The crew rescues one of the long-lost founders of the Commonwealth, but discover she may be more trouble than she is worth.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A mythological space monster tries to eat the Andromeda.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan attempts to liberate a fleet of captured ships who aren't sure they want to be liberated. Their AIs fear new captains will enslave them.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Genites attack Tyr's wife and colony, and he discovers that he is a father - and his son may be the genetic reincarnation of Drago Mussevni.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: With 50 parties on board, Dylan hosts the signing of the New Commonwealth charter but soon discovers there are intruders intent on stopping the signing.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka and Tyr are taken over by the energy from a dimensional tunnel. Dylan, Trance, and Harper must save them before they destroy the ship.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: After a family is found massacred inside their Santa Claus, Georgia home, the hunt for their killer hinges on the eyewitness testimony of the three young surviving daughters.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: A Thanksgiving feast turns into a family's last when a cold blooded killer brutally stabs and dismembers a couple the day after their holiday celebration.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: Dayton, Ohio, is terrorized over the Christmas holiday as a string of brutal shootings have the residents wondering if they could be next.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: Beloved Christmas tree farmers are executed in the front seat of their car and a manhunt for their killer is launched that keeps investigators on the case for over three decades before justice is served.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: When a young mother is murdered during Christmas, investigators uncover a love triangle that shocks her family and forever robs them of their holiday cheer.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: A teenage boy discovers a real-life horror scene in his home on Halloween morning; investigators must determine if the triple homicide is a random act of evil or a premeditated slaughter by someone close to the family.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: After a single young mother fails to show up for work on Halloween, her family and friends suspect murder.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Minnesota police hunt for a killer caller who confesses to a string of murders in a chilling, high-pitched voice, begging for forgiveness; no one can identify him until one woman survives a brutal attack.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In the summer of 1976, the NYPD are chasing a man shooting at couples in parked cars with a gigantic, .44 caliber handgun; he taunts the city with terrifying letters until police get a lead about a suspect who has shot a neighbor's dog.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Brooklyn shop keepers are afraid of closing time as a killer shoots his victims while locking up their stores.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In the 1990's, New York is on edge as a killer leaves coded clues at crime scenes and declares his compulsion to choose victims by their birth signs.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A rash of young men goes missing around Chicago during the 1970s; when bodies start washing up in the river, a pattern emerges; a small piece of evidence leads police to the home of a model citizen, where his furnace puts the suspect in the hot seat.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Police find a string of murdered women in shallow graves in very remote areas of the Alaskan wilderness; after months of searching, police zero in on a local family man living a double life that no one suspects.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Numerous women are found dead by the side of the road with a unique ligature that looks like a dog collar and leash; detectives are stumped until a 17-year-old girl manages an escape from a vicious kidnapper, leading police to a serial killer.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: The I-5 corridor in California is taken over by a brazen bandit who terrorizes the highway with a blitz of assaults and murders; the only clue to the killer's identity is a specific athletic tape used to bind his victims.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A serial killer taunts Wichita, Kan., for decades by sending brazen letters and taking credit for horrific kills; at the introduction of the computer era, the killer gets sloppy and accidentally leaves a digital clue.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In the 1990s, Louisiana is terrorized by multiple serial killers; the Zachary Police Department discovers the key to solving their cases when a pattern emerges with personal items missing from each local victim.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 6
programme.desc: Vin Diesel, Paul Walker, Dwayne Johnson, and Michelle Rodriguez lead a cast of returning all-stars as they race down an organization of lethal drivers trying to steal a top secret weapon.

programme.title: Shooter
programme.desc: Determined to prove his innocence in a double-cross, Bob Lee Swagger is now in a high-tension race from every law enforcement agency in the US and a shadowy organization that wants him dead.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: A World War II captain (Tom Hanks) and his squad (Edward Burns, Tom Sizemore) risk all to locate and send home a soldier whose three brothers died in combat.

programme.title: Olympus Has Fallen
programme.desc: Secret Service agent Mike Banning finds himself trapped inside the White House in the wake of a terrorist attack and works to rescue the President from his kidnappers.

programme.title: London Has Fallen
programme.desc: In London for the Prime Minister's funeral, Mike Banning is caught up in a plot to assassinate all the attending world leaders.

programme.title: Shooter
programme.desc: Determined to prove his innocence in a double-cross, Bob Lee Swagger is now in a high-tension race from every law enforcement agency in the US and a shadowy organization that wants him dead.

programme.title: Gaiking
programme.desc: Dick intervenes just in time and takes the blade in the shoulder instead of Garis. Lulu gets taken away again by Proist, and Garis and the others return to Daiku-Maryu. There, Sakon, Daimon, and Franklin reveal Garis and Lulu's secret.

programme.title: Gaiking
programme.desc: Garis must be taken to a rebel fort to get treated, but in order to get there, Daiku-Maryu must fly through a dangerous minefield.

programme.title: Gaiking
programme.desc: Daiku-Maryu docks by a beautiful lake, and the crewmembers enjoy a moment of relaxation. There, Daiya compares his friend Naoto and his video games to their battle against Raiking and Vulking.

programme.title: Gaiking
programme.desc: Lee infiltrates Daichi-Maryu and finds a way to undo the brainwash on Vestarnu. He tells Daiya to do the same thing to Noza. Shizuka and Sakon overtake Tenku-Maryu, and now the three Maryus and the three Giants of Flame are under their control.

programme.title: Gaiking
programme.desc: Daiya and Puria are blown away to the surface on Gaiking's torso and Superior Stinger. They find themselves on a deserted island but don't have enough flame in their machines to fly anywhere.

programme.title: Gaiking
programme.desc: When Kaikink is fixed, more Steel Beasts attack the cargo ship. Then suddenly, Killjaguar and Daiku-Maryu show up and join the battle. They destroy the Steel Beasts, and Daiya and Puria go back onto Daiku-Maryu.

programme.title: Gaiking
programme.desc: Daiku-Maryu heads toward the coast of California looking for the remnants of the Super Maryu.

programme.title: Gaiking
programme.desc: Daiku-Maryu returns to Darius with a special missile that creates Death Cross Point.

programme.title: Gaiking
programme.desc: Emperor Darius contacts Lulu and asks her to stop Proist. He asks for a meeting and says he will bring Daiya's father with him. Lulu thinks that it may be a trap, but decides to meet him anyway.

programme.title: Gaiking
programme.desc: Proist puts Daiya's dad in a pod inside the Super Maryu Beast, Final Dvorzak. The pod is connected to the beast's heart with cords, and when Daiya tries to pull it out, some cords break, making his dad feel excruciating pain.

programme.title: Gaiking
programme.desc: Lulu is devastated over Dick's death and refuses to command the ship until Rosa makes her come to her senses. Daiya returns to Daiku-Maryu for refueling and have a tearful reunion with his father.

programme.title: Gaiking
programme.desc: Proist comes back to life after her four generals sacrifice their lives for her. She shows up in Daiku-Maryu, and turns into a demon out of jealousy and rage when she sees Daiya with his dad and Lulu with her dad, Garis.

programme.title: Gakuen Heaven
programme.desc: Keita Ito isn't anything special--even he'd tell you that. But when he's invited to attend the elite Bell Liberty School, also known as BL Academy, his inability to stand out makes him the center of everyone's attention!

programme.title: Gakuen Heaven
programme.desc: Keita gets to know the students at BL Academy--some friendly, some less so, and a bit TOO friendly.

programme.title: Gakuen Heaven
programme.desc: Keita is given a letter to deliver to all the team captains, but he isn't allowed to read it himself. What could it be?

programme.title: Gakuen Heaven
programme.desc: After his first day at class, the boys put on a welcoming party for Keita. The venue's a bit strange, though, as is the entertainment.

programme.title: Gakuen Heaven
programme.desc: When the boys try to hunt down Tonosama, they find a mysterious door that supposedly leads to Heaven.

programme.title: Gakuen Heaven
programme.desc: A Sunday promise sees Keita and Kazuki going out on a date. But the truth that Kazuki has kept hidden until now threatens to boil over.

programme.title: Gakuen Heaven
programme.desc: After a meeting with the Vice-Chairman, Keita's life at BL Academy is jeopardized. Does he really belong here?

programme.title: Gakuen Heaven
programme.desc: The boys pull together to get Keita's expulsion overturned, but the Board doesn't budge. Will Keita himself challenge the decision?

programme.title: Gakuen Heaven
programme.desc: The MVP Battle begins. As Keita and Kazuki scramble to win the 'wish', the Vice-Chairman enacts plans to prevent them from their goal.

programme.title: Gakuen Heaven
programme.desc: As Keita and Kazuki work their way through the MVP Battle challenges, their relationship sours even as Keita struggles to recall forgotten memories.

programme.title: Gakuen Heaven
programme.desc: In the aftermath of winning the MVP Battle, Keita's gotten overly popular! But the one person he wants to see is nowhere to be found. Will Kazuki finally reveal his secret?

programme.title: Gakuen Heaven
programme.desc: Keita is abducted by Jin, and Kazuki must face the consequences of the Suzubishi Group's dark past.

programme.title: Gakuen Heaven
programme.desc: After everything's said and done, it's another day at BL Academy. Keita is together with all of his friends... and together with Kazuki.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The Angel Brigade's original purpose was to discover lost technology, but they end up doing household duties.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: On this day, the Angel Brigade is supposed to welcome their newest member but Forte and Ranpha have gone on a vacation to a casino.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The Angel Brigade has been assigned to sort trash. They have been told that there is a Lost Technology buried in the trash.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Yuri and the others attend a race between rare animals, where Yuri puts himself on the line against Vullion to restore the freedom of the western area!

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Having returned to the Demon Kingdom, Yuri learns from Gisela what happened twenty years ago with Hube and a woman named Julia...

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Hube attacks Yuri once again, and this time, Gwendal will see to it that Hube dies for his crimes! Will Hube survive to see the birth of his child?!

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: With Yuri back in the human world once more, Conrad reminisces about his mission to deliver the soul of the next Demon King to Earth.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Human unrest in the Demon World is leading to a potential war, pulling Yuri back from Earth. But this time, he wasn't summoned by Conrad and the others! Who is behind this?

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Now that Murata is in the Demon World has well, Yuri brings him along as they meet the owner of a castle in the hopes of returning to the Demon Kingdom.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Traveling from Caloria to Big Cimaron, Yuri, Murata, and Lady Julia are attacked by Small Cimaron as Josak reveals his presence!

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Captured by Big Cimaron, Yuri learns of the four Forbidden Boxes and the tremendous destructive power that they hold...

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Maxine intends to open the box using Conrad's arm as the key, but Murata warns of the consequences of using the wrong key!

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Yuri confronts Murata about who he really is while the people of Caloria agree to receive help from the Demon Tribe.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: The quadrennial Ultimate Tournament is approaching and Yuri proposes forming a team to win back The End of the Wind despite Big Cimaron's rigging of the games.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: The tournament begins and Lady Flynn is captured for ransom to force Yuri's team to forfeit the battle!

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: With Lady Flynn's rescue, Yuri prepares for his fight, but his resolve is shaken when he discovers who he's facing...

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Big Cimaron's King Belar declares Yuri's team disqualified and awards the win to his own country, but Yuri refuses to abide such disrespect to sporting competition and unleashes his power!

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: While Yuri tries to convince Murata to return him to the Demon World, Big Cimaron has located another Forbidden Box!

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Heathcrife helps Yuri and the others travel to a land called Fransia, where the next box is located, but Fransia's king refuses to pick a side...

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: After hours of chasing down the box, Yuri and the others track it to an old training ground, but are they walking into a trap?

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: With Fransia under Big Cimaron's control, escape is nearly impossible for Yuri as Conrad arrives and is ordered by King Belar to execute him!

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: As Fransia forms an alliance with the Demon Kingdom and Conrad remains imprisoned, Yuri and the others seek to discover the reason for his betrayal.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Yuri's older brother thinks back to when Yuri was younger and the two brothers spent the day at an amusement park to get away from their feuding parents.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: A number of children are gathered for a celebration at Covenant Castle, including Hube and Nicola's son El, but things go crazy when El's magic powers are amplified by one of Anissina's devices!

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Lady Ulrike falls ill, while at the same time, a girl that resembles her appears in town and demonstrates incredible magical powers, leaving Yuri, Wolfram, and Conrad to try and rein her in.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Princess Elizabeth, the winner of the Great Demon Kingdom beauty pageant, is used by Stoffel to enact a plan to form a bond with Yuri, but she claims to already be engaged... to Wolfram?!

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Continuing the hunt for the final box, Yuri and the others hear of a box at the bottom of a lake and head there, where they meet Ulrike's predecessor and learn of the history of the land around them.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Bandits threaten a small town and Gwendal finds himself joining Conrad's father, Lord Dunheely, in helping the townspeople. Can Gwendal set aside his prejudice against humans for the good of the people?

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Big Cimaron proposes a student exchange as a cover to strike back after their box is stolen, but the Great Demon Kingdom and their allies don't fall for it, leading Gwendal to plan his own covert mission.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Yuri is taken hostage by Adalbert, who demands to know if Yuri truly has Julia's soul, but he finds himself having to defend Yuri from Big Cimaron's soldiers as the island's volcano starts to rumble...

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto the Movie
programme.desc: Sasuke appears before Naruto to warn him of impending danger. An inconceivable foe lies in wait as Sasuke, the Five Kage and Boruto, charge into another dimension!

programme.title: Bleach: Fade to Black
programme.desc: Ichigo must fight a lonely battle to save Rukia before the two are forced to part ways forever!

programme.title: Bleach: Hellverse
programme.desc: Ichigo must travel into the depths of Hell to save his younger sister Yuzu.

programme.title: Bleach: Memories of Nobody
programme.desc: Ichigo and his fellow Soul Reapers must save two worlds from annihilation.

programme.title: Bleach: The DiamondDust Rebellion
programme.desc: After the treasured Ouin is stolen, Toshiro Hitsugaya disappears and becomes suspected of treason.

programme.title: Ghost In The Shell
programme.desc: 2029 – A female government cyber agent and the Internal Bureau of Investigations are hot on the trail of a "The Puppet Master" – a computer virus capable of invading cybernetic brains and altering its victim’s memory.

programme.title: Maquia: When The Promised Flower Blooms
programme.desc: Escaping war, a young girl finds a lone surviving infant and decides to raise him as her son.

programme.title: Millennium Actress [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: When the legendary Ginei Studios shuts down, filmmaker Genya Tachibana and his assistant are tasked with interviewing its reclusive star, Chiyoko Fujiwara, who had retired from the spotlight 30 years prior.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: The crew tries to get their machinery across surging rivers to set up their new mountaintop jade mine.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Alan is convinced there's jade under a pit full of water on their Dynasty claim. Josh's mechanical skills are tested while trying to get a giant boulder to a new buyer.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Robin tries to defy the laws of physics to get a massive new bunkhouse to their Wolverine claim. A serious accident shocks Jade City.

programme.title: Fisherman's Handbook
programme.desc: In the early springtime, fish migrations and patterns change with the weather. We cover exactly how to handle these changes in patterns on this episode of the Fisherman's Handbook.

programme.title: Fisherman's Handbook
programme.desc: Each year host Wade Middleton and good buddy Jeff Reynolds pick a few days stretch to travel across the south fishing numerous bodies of water in search of that next bite. Join the duo as they work their way across north Texas catching fish.

programme.title: Fisherman's Handbook
programme.desc: We take a look at a variety of fishing items designed to help you catch more fish. You'll see insight on fishing baits, line, rods, reels, electronics and boats in this episode.

programme.title: Fisherman's Handbook
programme.desc: Tips and topics on how to find fish when a lake is flooded. Wade Middleton and Pro Anglers share their knowledge so you can still find fish even when waters are higher than normal!

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: The Whalers refuse to haul the expeditions fuel any further North. The men must calculate if they have enough fuel and food to make it. The ocean begins to freeze right beneath the men’s watercraft.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: New crewmember Scott gets his first taste of an angry ocean. Relentless high sea’s put the entire expedition on a new course.

programme.title: Anglers Digest
programme.desc: You'll join us on an informative island tour of volcanoes, waterfalls, gardens, and scenic viewpoints, and even get a chance to party with the friendly natives that are lucky enough to call this paradise their home.

programme.title: Anglers Digest
programme.desc: This episode includes a great island tour where you'll explore the island history, the natural scenic splendors, and a city tour of Willemstad, all of which will make you strongly consider a trip here in the future.

programme.title: Anglers Digest
programme.desc: IGFA Anglers Digest returns to Grand Cayman to fish and dive in this secluded piece of paradise. Known the world over for its world class scuba diving, those who really know the island come to fish as well.

programme.title: Anglers Digest
programme.desc: Having never been to these amazing Caribbean jewels, I can now see what everyone has raved about the last several years.

programme.title: Alone

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall
programme.desc: Eisenhower halts Monty's costly gamble as British forces retreat before destruction. Heavy casualties and strategic failures haunt the Allies, with lasting effects for the war's remainder.

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep10

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep11

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep12
programme.desc: Catalina hace el amor con Albeiro después de embriagarlo para que no se note la pérdida de su virginidad. Catalina y Jessica se devuelven a Bogotá. El hombre oscuro contrata a Bairon para matar a un político.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep13
programme.desc: El hombre oscuro le da la misión a Bairon y a su compañero de eliminar al magistrado con un tiempo límite de un mes. Catalina seduce a Octavio. El hombre las echa de la casa. Las mujeres se encuentran con el doctor para la cirugía de los senos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep14
programme.desc: A Catalina le realizan la operación, las mujeres son echadas del apartamento de Octavio pues él se ha enamorado de ella y se percata de una mentira por parte de ella. La mujer se ve con el Titi el cual se entusiasma por verla operada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep15
programme.desc: Catalina empieza con su cronograma de trabajo como prepago. Albeiro se encuentra en Bogotá con Octavio, se entera de muchas cosas de su novia. El guardaespaldas le cuenta a su patrón Marcial haberse enamorado de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep16
programme.desc: Catalina convence a su novio de estar juiciosa en la capital, los dos hacen el amor. Hilda se entera y cachetea a su hija. Catalina se ve con el Titi y lo golpea, el mafioso la manda a matar junto a Jessica. Las mujeres se refugian donde Marcial.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep17
programme.desc: Catalina acepta vivir donde Marcial para ocultarse del Titi. Albeiro se muda donde Hilda, comienzan su relación amorosa. Catalina entra al concurso de ''Miss Chica Linda'', Marcial trata de asegurar la victoria de la mujer.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep18
programme.desc: Mauricio advierte a Catalina del peligro que posee si no le quita las prótesis. La gente del barrio ven el reinado, la mujer pelea con otra concursante, Catalina no gana. La mujer vuelve a su pueblo, se percata que Albeiro vive ahora con su madre

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep19

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep20

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep21
programme.desc: El Titi es capturado y extraditado por la DEA. A Catalina le extraen la prótesis por el dolor tan fuerte que estaba sufriendo. Jessica hace el amor con Marcial, le cuenta cosas malas de su amiga. Catalina es llevada a urgencias por Pelambre.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep22
programme.desc: Catalina es informada por el médico que no puede volver a utilizar implantes por lo menos en un lapso de dos años. Marcial presenta a Jessica como su nueva esposa. El capitán Salgado es asesinado. Jessica se despide de su amiga con una excusa.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep23
programme.desc: Catalina visita a su familia. La mujer se ve con Pelambre, se entera el romance de Marcial y Jessica. La mujer le pide al guardaespaldas matar a Jessica en un restaurante, sin embargo Catalina se hace pasar por ella y es asesinada en vez de la Diabla

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Eduvina no sigue las órdenes de su médico, Franco tampoco calma su euforia y las consecuencias son inevitables. Juan y Óscar quieren irse del pueblo, imaginan a su hermano en una luna de miel.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Malcolm y Carmela humillan a Franco y acusan a Eva de ladrona, ella se entera de que Reyes es dueño de la hacienda y busca a sus hermanos. Juan obliga al viudo de Eduvina a poner todo en su sitio.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco le pide ayuda a Juan y a Óscar, su hermano mayor se niega hasta que Eva lo convence para que acepte. Jimena consigue trabajo, Fernando llega con Pepita a la hacienda Elizondo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los Reyes asumen sus responsabilidades en la hacienda, pasan los meses y Norma da a luz a su bebé, Jimena tiene éxito en su trabajo aunque extraña a Óscar, él no aguanta los celos al verla.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan acepta la decisión de su hermano porque es la oportunidad para acercarse a Norma, ella se preocupa cuando ve a Fernando con su bebé. Jimena le muestra a Ruth unas fotos de Libia.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sarita se encuentra con el nuevo dueño de la hacienda Trueba, con quien tiene una fuerte discusión, ella cae del caballo y se desmaya, cuando despierta está en la habitación de Franco.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sarita y Franco pelean de nuevo, esta vez delante de todos los invitados a la fiesta en honor a los Reyes. Juan muere de celos al ver a Fernando con Gabriela, teme que Norma haya vuelto con él.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan conoce a su hijo y lo toma en sus brazos con ternura, Gabriela arma un escándalo hasta que Norma aclara que él tiene derechos porque es el padre, luego ella desacata la orden de su madre.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando acepta la propuesta de trabajo de Gabriela, Norma accede, aunque exige que no se inmiscuya en su vida, ella está dispuesta a enfrentar a su madre por Juan. Rosario pregunta por Franco.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan le da un regalo a su hijo cuando vuelve a encontrarse con Norma en los límites de la hacienda, ella no esconde sus sentimientos. Ruth desafía a su madre y comienza a trabajar con Leandro.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma descubre que su bebé no tiene la cadena que le regaló Juan y se enfrenta con Gabriela, mientras que Martín le aconseja que vuelva con el padre de su hijo. Armando se enfurece con Rosario.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando asume el cargo de administrador de la hacienda Elizondo, tanto Norma como Juan desconfían de sus intenciones. Óscar pide ser el galán del comercial de Jimena y Rosario busca a Franco.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan quiere que sus hermanos conozcan a su hijo, Norma no se opone y tiene una dura discusión con Gabriela. En la filmación del comercial, Jimena ve que el galán es Óscar, él la secuestra.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma decide bautizar al bebé y le dice a Juan que se llamará Juan David, después del bautizo él le presenta su hijo a todos los empleados. Gabriela interroga a Fernando sobre Dínora.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers Dangle from amazing heights to retrieve their first clue in Antwerp Belgium.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Things get slimy at a fishy challenge in Tangiers. Morocco.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: How will a pair of Indy Car racers handle a self-drive in Saint-Tropez, France?

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The stakes are high as teams face the Double U-Turn.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers swap teammates for an entire leg for the first time ever in Amazing Race history!

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Will one team's game be on the line when they misplace their passport?

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Things get hairy for teams in Hong Kong when tasked with wrangling fifty hairy crabs in the pouring rain.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Emmy Award-winning THE AMAZING RACE returns with the first reality showdown among some of the most memorable and competitive players from THE AMAZING RACE, SURVIVOR and BIG BROTHER.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers have a big decision to make when they face a surprise double U-turn in Laos.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Vietnam where they must master synchronized dancing, karaoke singing and fishing for prawns.

programme.desc: Barney is evicted from his rooming house for illegal cooking and moves into the Mayberry sheriff's office backroom much to Andy's chagrin.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney adds a vintage motorcycle to the rolling stock of the Mayberry Sheriff's department, to the Sheriff's regret.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A beautiful prisoner threatens to crumble the security of the Mayberry jail, as both Andy and Barney fall for her charms.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Otis Campbell acquires a car and threatens life and limb of Mayberry's pedestrian population.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney suffers an ego blow when Gomer out-sings him for a part in the Mayberry Choir. Andy Griffith's wife, Barbara, appears in this episode as a member of the singing group.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney disguises himself as a dummy in an attempt to solve a series of theft at the Mayberry department store.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy takes a week off, leaving Barney and Gomer in charge. A prisoner also takes off in the resultant confusion.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gomer falls asleep on the job and Andy douses a fire to save his life. Gomer becomes a menace trying to repay the favor.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee saves money by buying a side of beef. The beef is tough, the freezer conks out, and Gomer attempts to fix the motor.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A strange mountain-style divorce ritual is frustrated by another ritual performed by Barney.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Opie gets caught in a scheme to sell a useless product, Barney and Gomer come to his rescue.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Joyce Jameson and Jean Carson appear as two fun-loving blondes who upset the sheriff's office.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: British comedian Bernard Fox plays an Englishman who returns to Mayberry and upsets Aunt Bee with his efficiency.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney interprets a kiss as a sign of a secret engagement between Andy and Helen. The town gets the word and prepares a surprise party for the couple.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney is furious when he sees his girl Thelma Lou kiss, Gomer.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The undaunted splendor of sky, trees, and lake has never been more beautifully portrayed than in this joyful Bob Ross creation.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A snowy mountain range, an ice-covered lake, and a lost little cabin combine to create a wintry testimony to Bob Ross' artistic magic.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Master class on meat with fourth-generation butcher Evan Lobel includes cutting up a whole chicken, spatchcocking a Cornish game hen, butterflying a leg of lamb, butchering a beef tenderloin and making medallions from a pork loin.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Fluffy white rice; pilaf; risotto; Thai fried rice.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: One of Martha's favorite things to do is to make jam with the perfectly ripened fruit and berries grown on her Bedford farm; Martha shares her favorite recipes, as well as jam and jarring techniques.

programme.title: Martha Cooks

programme.title: Martha Cooks

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: From a pan seared steak with bordelaise sauce to a classic sizzling steak fired up on the grill, Martha makes steak dinners cooked to perfection with the help of her Head of Culinary at the farm.

programme.title: Martha Cooks

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Martha serves up a delicious chicken dinner with fresh ingredients from her greenhouse; joined by her good friend Kevin Sharkey, they celebrate the perfect meal for a taste of home-cooked goodness.

programme.title: Martha Cooks

programme.title: Martha Cooks

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: “To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth”.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In criminal investigations, a simple clue can provide the missing link by placing a suspect at a crime scene. Dirt left on shoes, tires or clothes, or even a tiny piece of plastic can pinpoint a crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Ballistics: A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head; the weapon lies next to the victim. It looks like suicide, but could it be murder? It's a question best solved by ballistics experts.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which as mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid the box exploded killing her instantly.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson Investigation: Insurance torchings, mob burnouts and arson murders: these crimes are designed to take all clues with them. But a solid case can be built from a heap of ashes.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic psychologists delve into the minds of serial killers, explaining why, most often, they can be a friendly neighbor or the tenacious co-worker – the one who hides his or her dark side better than anyone else.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims – And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder – These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: What does it take to prove murder if the victim cannot be found? Investigators must go to extreme lengths to catch the killer when the victim is presumed dead.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Three hairs… microscopic fibers… a common trash bag ripped from a roll. Seemingly small and insignificant clues become a victim's silent witness.
